gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; students who clutch resumes inside branded folders line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, alongside tech companies displaying demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
